verifier_input.doc_snippet: This study developed a machine learning-integrated Power BI dashboard to predict whether undergraduate Computer Science students will graduate on time or experience delayed graduation. Using a dataset of 4500 student records, several machine learning algorithms were implemented and evaluated with Random Forest achieving the most reliable predictive performance. The system combines predictive modelling with interactive visualization, enabling academic staff and advisors to monitor student performance and identify potential academic risks more effectively. A limitation of this study is the use of a synthetic dataset, which may not fully capture real-world variability.
